{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Cha’tur’niak, Devourer of Dimensions
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cha’tur’niak, Devourer of Dimensions]], is a being that eats worlds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
